_comment: Rolepod Codex hooks (PR 6 slim + PR 7 MemPalace bridge). 3 plugin hooks — byte-exact mirrors of root hooks/*.sh (parity enforced by tests/static/lean-surface.sh). Claude-only hooks (block-subagent-commit, cohesion-contract-check, session-lifecycle, gitnexus-wrap) are NOT registered here because Codex has no Agent / Stop event API and uses a different plugin model. Optional GitNexus integration (hooks/optional/gitnexus/post-ship-detect.sh) ships at the path but is not registered by default; enable manually if you adopt GitNexus on Codex. Optional MemPalace × Codex SessionStart bridge (hooks/optional/mempalace/codex-session-start.sh) ships at the path; install.sh upserts a SessionStart entry into this hooks.json only when `command -v mempalace` succeeds at install time. The hook is also self-guarded — without mempalace on PATH it exits 0 silently. Codex still needs `codex features enable plugin_hooks` before any hook here fires. verify-reminder was removed in PR 6 — verification is owned by the check-work skill + precommit-gate, not by a per-edit nag hook.
